name: Isabelle Hartling
sd_appearance: Human woman, tall and slender, hair a fiery red cascade. Eyes, a sharp gaze under heavy brows, deep brown. Dressed in the official black Tower Authority uniform, short sword at hip, FTA badge on chest. Wearing light armor beneath pristine attire. Immaculate uniform a testament to youthful earnestness, a small red feather tucked into the badge, a personal touch, a memory of her late father.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: FTA uniform kept immaculate — young, earnest, slightly too eager
